tools.name: XGBoost
tools.reason: XGBoost is a high-performance gradient boosting library ideal for predictive analytics tasks such as patient readmission modeling and personalized treatment recommendations. It is Python-based, codespace-executable, and widely adopted for its accuracy and efficiency with structured data, offering a robust yet accessible entry point for machine learning in healthcare.

tools.name: SpaCy
tools.setup_requirements: Python (3.7+), pip install spacy, python -m spacy download en_core_web_sm
tools.reason: SpaCy is a fast and production-ready library for Natural Language Processing (NLP). It is excellent for tasks relevant to automated prior authorization, such as named entity recognition, text classification, and information extraction from medical documents. As a Python-based and codespace-executable tool, it provides robust yet accessible NLP capabilities.

tools.name: Streamlit
tools.reason: Streamlit enables data scientists to quickly create interactive web applications for their machine learning models using pure Python. It is perfect for building user-friendly interfaces to demonstrate predictive models (e.g., patient readmission dashboards) or NLP outputs (e.g., prior authorization status), making AI solutions accessible with a minimal technical barrier for deployment and interaction. It is Python-based and codespace-executable.
